description: Beta patch: make Claude shared-worktree sessions bootstrap planning state correctly and let `trellis-implement` run with `acceptEdits` so subagent implementation can actually write code.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- fix(claude): `trellis-implement` now ships with `acceptEdits`, bringing the generated Claude agent contract in line with the documented implementation workflow.
- fix(worktree): shared worktree session bootstrap now restores the runtime bundle and planning snapshot more reliably, so subagent sessions stay aligned with the active task context.
- fix(update): template/update coverage was refreshed together with the Claude workflow content so existing projects can receive the same worktree and agent-contract fixes through `trellis update`.

**Notes:**
- This is a generated-template/content refresh for Claude/Trellis projects; no manual file migration is required.
notes: Run `trellis update` to pick up the Claude agent permission refresh and the shared-worktree bootstrap fixes. No manual file migration is required.
